name: 暗影步传送
description: 回合开始时传送到预设位置
code: function executeSkill(context) { const sourcePiece = context.piece; if (!sourcePiece.statusTags) { return { message: '', success: false }; } const shadowStepStatus = sourcePiece.statusTags.find(tag => tag.type === 'shadow-step'); if (!shadowStepStatus) { return { message: '', success: false }; } if (shadowStepStatus.remainingDuration <= 0) { return { message: '', success: false }; } if (context.playerId !== sourcePiece.ownerPlayerId) { return { message: '', success: false }; } const targetX = shadowStepStatus.value; const targetY = shadowStepStatus.intensity; const shadowStepSourceId = 'shadow-step-' + sourcePiece.instanceId; const cleanupAndCancel = function(reason) { if (battle.extensions && battle.extensions.tileEffects) { battle.extensions.tileEffects = battle.extensions.tileEffects.filter(function(te) { return !(te.tileType === 'shadow-step' && te.sourceId === shadowStepSourceId); }); } const index = sourcePiece.statusTags.findIndex(tag => tag.type === 'shadow-step'); if (index !== -1) { sourcePiece.statusTags.splice(index, 1); } return { message: sourcePiece.name + '的暗影步' + reason + '，传送取消', success: true }; }; const targetTile = battle.map.tiles.find(t => t.x === targetX && t.y === targetY); if (!targetTile || !targetTile.props.walkable) { return cleanupAndCancel('目标位置不可行走'); } const pieceAtPos = battle.pieces.find(p => p.x === targetX && p.y === targetY && p.currentHp > 0); if (pieceAtPos) { return cleanupAndCancel('目标位置已被占用'); } if (battle.extensions && battle.extensions.tileEffects) { battle.extensions.tileEffects = battle.extensions.tileEffects.filter(function(te) { return !(te.tileType === 'shadow-step' && te.sourceId === shadowStepSourceId); }); } sourcePiece.x = targetX; sourcePiece.y = targetY; const index = sourcePiece.statusTags.findIndex(tag => tag.type === 'shadow-step'); if (index !== -1) { sourcePiece.statusTags.splice(index, 1); } return { message: sourcePiece.name + '通过暗影步传送到了(' + targetX + ',' + targetY + ')', success: true }; }
